# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: vpc-network
  type: google::vpc/network
  properties:
    project: "${project_id}"
    name: ${var.vpc_name}
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true

- name: subnet-tier1
  type: google::compute/subnetwork
  properties:
    project: "${project_id}"
    region: ${region}
    network: $(ref.vpc-network)
    name: ${var.subnet1_name}
    ipCidrRange: $(ref.tier1_cidr)

- name: subnet-tier2
  type: google::compute/subnetwork
  properties:
    project: "${project_id}"
    region: ${region}
    network: $(ref.vpc-network)
    name: ${var.subnet2_name}
    ipCidrRange: $(ref.tier2_cidr)

- name: subnet-tier3
  type: google::compute/subnetwork
  properties:
    project: "${project_id}"
    region: ${region}
    network: $(ref.vpc-network)
    name: ${var.subnet3_name}
    ipCidrRange: $(ref.tier3_cidr)

variables:
  vpc_name: "my-vpc"
  region: "us-central1"
  tier1_cidr: '10.0.1.0/24'
  tier2_cidr: '10.0.2.0/24'
  tier3_cidr: '10.0.3.0/24'
  subnet1_name: "tier1-subnet"
  subnet2_name: "tier2-subnet"
  subnet3_name: "tier3-subnet"
